title: Keto Spanish Torta
description: A low-carb twist on the classic Spanish torta, made with mature cheddar cheese and wrapped in a low-carb tortilla wrap.
instructions: Preheat a panini press or grill to medium-high heat.
Place a tortilla wrap in the press and top with 2 slices of mature cheddar cheese.
Add a few sliced briny olives on top of the cheese.
Place the other tortilla wrap on top of the filling and press or grill for 2-3 minutes or until the cheese is melted and the wrap is crispy.
Slice in half and serve immediately.
